articles.headline: Lamine Yamal: 'Incredible' to see Lionel Messi still starring at World Cup
articles.description: Spain winger Lamine Yamal has said he is thrilled to see Lionel Messi defy time and continue to have a starring role at this World Cup.

images.name: Lamine Yamal [1296x729]
images.credit: Photo by Grzegorz Wajda/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images

images.name: Why Spain's substitutes were so important vs. Portugal
images.caption: Alex Kirkland reacts to Spain's late 1-0 win over Portugal to advance to the quarterfinals.

articles.headline: Keir Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup
articles.description: An England World Cup win could mean an extra bank holiday, Sir Keir Starmer has hinted ahead of a quarterfinal clash with Norway.

images.name: Keir Starmer [1296x729]
images.caption: United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer and Norway's Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Store greet the media at the Nato summit
images.alt: United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer and Norway's Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Store greet the media at the Nato summit

images.name: Harry Kane Jude Bellingham [1296x729]
images.caption: Harry Kane (left) and Jude Bellingham (right) celebrate Kane's goal for England on Sunday.

images.name: Odegaard: Norway's quarterfinal against England a 'massive test'
images.caption: Odegaard: Norway's quarterfinal against England a 'massive test'

articles.headline: Morocco star Saibari to miss World Cup quarterfinal vs. France
articles.description: Morocco will be without star forward Ismael Saibari for their World Cup quarterfinal with France on Thursday.

images.name: Ismael Saibari [1296x729]
images.caption: Ismael Saibari suffered an injury in Morocco's win over Canada.
images.alt: Ismael Saibari #11 (C) of Morocco reacts after sustaining an injury during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 match between Canada and Morocco at Houston Stadium on July 04, 2026 in Houston, Texas.

article.headline: Larin rescues late draw for Canada against Bosnia-Herzegovina
article.description: Substitute Cyle Larin scored in the 78th minute and co-host Canada earned a first point in their third World Cup appearance -- and first on home soil -- by rallying for a 1-1 draw against Bosnia-Herzegovina on Friday.
article.linkText: Larin goal helps Canada earn first WC point ever

images.name: Did Canada miss Alphonso Davies vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina?

video.headline: Did Canada miss Alphonso Davies vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina?
video.shortHeadline: Did Canada miss Alphonso Davies vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina?
video.title: Did Canada miss Alphonso Davies vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina?

tracking.trackingName: COM_SOC_ANALYSIS (Did Canada miss Alphonso Davies vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina?) 2026_6_12

article.story:
TORONTO -- Substitute Cyle Larin scored in the 78th minute and co-host Canada earned a first point in their third World Cup appearance -- and first on home soil -- by rallying for a 1-1 draw against Bosnia-Herzegovina on Friday.

Playing in the shadow of Toronto's iconic CN Tower and in front of a sea of red "Ca-na-da!" chanting fans including hockey star Connor McDavid and actor Ryan Reynolds, Larin converted Promise David's pass just two minutes after entering the game.

The goal was only the second in World Cup play for Canada after the team lost all three of its games at the 1986 tournament in Mexico and again four years ago at Qatar.

Injury fill-in Jovo Lukic headed in a corner kick in the 21st minute for Bosnia-Herzegovina, which are making their second World Cup appearance. Bosnia-Herzegovina failed to advance out of group play in Brazil in 2014.

Starting in place of Edin Dzeko (shoulder) and Haris Tabakovic (undisclosed), Lukic was in an ideal position to cap a set piece with captain Sead Kolasinac flicking along a header off Ivan Basic's corner kick. The goal was Lukic's first in international play and coming in the 27-year-old attacker's fourth international appearance.

Despite giving up the lead, the small Balkan nation of about 3 million people keeps coming up big on the international stage -- including eliminating four-time champion Italy in the European playoffs.

Before Larin's goal, Canada's best scoring chance came in the 54th minute when captain Stephen Eustáquio fed the ball to Richie Laryea in front of a wide-open net. The ball deflected off Kolasinac's foot and hit the crossbar.

Canada played without Alphonso Davies (hamstring), who scored the nation's first World Cup goal four years ago in Qatar.

Canada now shift to Vancouver for their final two group games, against Qatar on June 18 and Switzerland on June 24.

The Bosnians also head west, with games against Switzerland on June 18 in Los Angeles and Qatar on June 24 in Seattle.

Information from The Associated Press was used in this recap.

stats.name: timesTackled
stats.description: The total number of times a player has been tackled.

stats.name: defensiveInterventions
stats.description: The sum of ball recoveries, won tackles, effective clearances, outfielder blocks, blocked crosses, and defensive third duels won.

stats.name: dnp

stats.name: draws

stats.name: foulsCommitted

stats.name: aerialsLost

stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct

stats.name: turnover

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: groundDuels

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: aerialsLost

stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: totalContest

stats.name: avgRatingFromCorrespondent
stats.description: The rating from a correspondent for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromDataFeed
stats.description: The rating from the data feed for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromEditor
stats.description: The rating from the editor(s) for a player.

stats.name: avgRatingFromUser
stats.description: The average user rating for a player.

stats.name: dnp
stats.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

stats.name: draws
stats.description: The number of times the scored ended even for both teams in a match and there was no extra time.

stats.name: foulsCommitted
stats.description: The number of fouls comitted by a player or team.

stats.name: foulsSuffered
stats.description: The number of fouls suffered by a player or team.

stats.name: goalDifference
stats.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

stats.name: handBalls
stats.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

stats.name: losses
stats.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

stats.name: lostCorners
stats.description: The number of corners conceded to the opposing team.

stats.name: minutes
stats.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.name: passPct
stats.description: The percentage of passes that result in the ball finding its target.

stats.name: redCards
stats.description: The number of red cards that have been issued.

stats.name: starts
stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.name: subIns
stats.description: The number of times a player has come on a sub in a match.

stats.name: subOuts
stats.description: The number of times a player has been subbed off in a match.

stats.name: suspensions
stats.description: The number of matches a player has been suspended.

stats.name: timeEnded
stats.description: The time a match ends.

stats.name: timeStarted
stats.description: The time a match starts.

stats.name: winPct
stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.name: wins
stats.description: The number of matches won.

stats.name: wonCorners
stats.description: The number of corners won.

stats.name: yellowCards
stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.
